name: Pathfinder follow-up
action: 追蹤 Pathfinder grant 結果（內部鎖定 3/10，原始 deadline 3/13）

name: NTU 國際傑出研究生獎學金確認
action: 確認申請時程和資格（研究獎助生是否衝突）（內部鎖定 3/11，原始 3/15）

name: MATS General Application 開放
action: 填 MATS General Application 線上表單（~2h）

name: 陳鴻珠教育基金 deadline
action: 確認研究生是否適用，如適用則申請

name: 中技社準備開始
action: 確認電信所內部截止日，開始寫研究計畫書

name: 中技社線上報名 OPEN
action: 立刻提交研究獎學金 + 生活助學金

name: MATS Research Task 準備衝刺
action: 開始 Research Task 環境搭建 + 選題確認

name: 9 月獎學金批次準備
action: 準備潘文淵 + 上海商銀 + 續讀獎勵金申請材料

name: MATS Neel Nanda Research Task DEADLINE
action: 提交 12-20h MI 研究報告 + Executive Summary

name: 僑委會捐贈獎助學金
action: 需 i 僑卡，申請僑委會獎助學金

name: ARENA 8.0 application deadline
action: 提交 ARENA 8.0 申請表（官方截止 3/8 23:59 AoE，台北時間約 3/9 19:59）

name: 申請工作證
action: 到 ezwp.wda.gov.tw 申請，經 NTU 僑生輔導組，NT$100，7天處理

name: LTFF Grant Application (Q2)
action: Submit 2-page proposal: AI Safety community building in Taiwan. funds.effectivealtruism.org/funds/far-future

name: Contact Kairos for organizer funding
action: Email Kairos/Open Phil about NTUAIS university group organizer funding

name: ISCA Student Travel Grant (Interspeech)
action: Apply after paper acceptance confirmed. Preference for underrepresented regions.
note: Exact deadline TBD — depends on Interspeech notification date

name: NSTC Conference Travel Grant
action: Apply through NTU for Interspeech 2026 travel costs. Nearly automatic with accepted paper.

name: Manifund/SFF Speculation Grants (rolling check)
action: Check Manifund regranting opportunities + SFF Speculation Grants for AI Safety research. manifund.org / survivalandflourishing.fund
note: Rolling — set next check date after reviewing

name: Jamie Lin SE Asia Scholarship (check eligibility)
action: Check NTU OIA for Jamie Lin Southeast Asia Scholarship details and deadline
note: NTU-specific, for SE Asian students. Deadline may be different — verify.

name: Schmidt Sciences Trustworthy AI RFP (Tier 1/2 - up to $5M+)
notes: Application due May 17 2026 AoE. Aim 2 = fit for T5/T3 (mechanistic audio interpretability + safety). Tier 1 up to $1M solo feasible. April 15 webinar. trustworthyai@schmidtsciences.org. FAQ: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1nuqku7P9yQaxLPkeIhs10-21SEX77LwxexRwVmqSxkI/edit
